    Enum CF2LineTypes

    CF2 line types

    Namespace: Aspose.CAD.FileFormats.CF2
    Assembly: Aspose.CAD.dll
    Syntax
    public enum CF2LineTypes

    AlignmentMark

    Line alignment marks

    AppliedButNotBurned

    The line is applied but not burned on the form.

    BurnedButNotCarryRulers

    The line is burned, but does not carry rulers and knives.

    Combined cutting strip
